subject: kernel: kexec_file: fix error return code of kexec_calculate_store_digests()
notes: Independent POC for rep2. First POC attempt (whole-file, both _buggy + _fixed) verifier-mismatched all dims because counts doubled; second attempt used a single-buggy-function poc-for-verifier.c slice (no main()) for apples-to-apples comparison with seed-slice.c.
Strict-pass verifier verdict: F1.acq=2 F1.rel=3 F3.goto=8 F5.ret=2 F2.if=15 (matches seed slice exactly).
Initial monolithic query also referenced LabelStmt.getStmt() which does not exist on the LabelStmt class in CodeQL 2.25.6 cpp-all; iter-1 repair dropped that filter.

Iter-2 repair tightened guardedByAcquireCheck to (a) require the status variable to NOT appear in the if condition and (b) accept either AssignExpr or VariableDeclarator-initializer assignments-from-FunctionCall — fixes the FP firings inside _fixed and other non-bug gotos guarded by `if (ret < 0)`.
Final query fires once on line 81 (_buggy: `if (!sha_regions) goto out_free_desc;` with no ret = -ENOMEM) and is silent on _fixed.

Query is Q6-compliant: no hardcoded function names, no `_buggy/_fixed` suffix dependence, no POC.c path; generic over functions with int status var initialised to 0, returned at end, with goto-on-acquire-null-check skipping error assignment.
POC sha256 verified unchanged between freeze and final analyze: d7c324cd...feccda.
